LAW AND MOTION 302, JUDGE KAHN MADE A DISCLOSURE THAT HE USED TO WORK WITH MR. ALLMAN AND THAT HE KNOWS JUSTICE LOW PROFESSIONALLY AND HE DOES NOT VIEW THIS AS A BASIS FOR HIS RECUSAL. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. RESPONDENT JACOB ZACHARIAH DOING BUSINESS AS WENDY'S OF UKIAH'S PETITION TO VACATE THE FEB 28, 2012 POLICY APPRAISAL AWARD IS DENIED. THE APPRAISAL PANEL DID NOT EXCEED ITS AUTHORITY. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LORETTA NAJERA CSR # 5153

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Petition To Vacate The Feb 28, 2012 Policy Appraisal Award
Off Calendar May-07-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Francis X. Doherty, Esq., of the Law Office of Francis X. Doherty, Tel. 415.455.0260, appearing for respondent and moving party.
Julian J. Pardini, Esq., of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP, Tel. 415.262.8506, appearing for petitioner and opposing party.

Judge Kahn made a disclosure that he used to work with Mr. Allman and that he knows Justice Low professionally and he does not view this as a basis for his recusal. No objections were made. The matter was argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. RESPONDENT JACOB ZACHARIAH DOING BUSINESS AS WENDY'S OF UKIAH's Petition To Vacate The Feb 28, 2012 Policy Appraisal Award is Denied. The Appraisal Panel did not exceed its authority. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: Loretta Najera CSR # 5153

Ntc Of Petition To Confirm Appraisal Award
Off Calendar May-07-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Julian J. Pardini, Esq., of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP, Tel. 415.262.8506, appearing for petitioner and moving party.
Francis X. Doherty, Esq., of the Law Office of Francis X. Doherty, Tel. 415.455.0260, appearing for respondent and opposing party.

Judge Kahn made a disclosure that he used to work with Mr. Allman and that he knows Justice Low professionally and he does not view this as a basis for his recusal. No objections were made. The matter was argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER AMCO INSURANCE COMPANY's Petition To Confirm Appraisal Award is Granted. There is no legal basis to not confirm the award. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: Loretta Najera CSR # 5153
